failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id 
    FROM profile 
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
)
SELECT 
    p.profile_id AS profile_id,
    pub.description,
    pub.published_at
FROM publication pub
JOIN target_profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.id
WHERE pub.description ILIKE '%dica%' 
   OR pub.description ILIKE '%lifestyle%'
   OR pub.description ILIKE '%rotina%'
ORDER BY pub.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
